debug_info.goal:
case left
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∃ m, p = 4 * m + 1 → {s | s ^ 2 = -1}.card = 2

proof:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : False := by
      have hp' : p = 1 := by simpa [hp]
      have : (p : ℕ) ≠ 1 := (Nat.Prime.ne_one (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p))
      exact this hp'
    exact False.elim this
failed_attempts:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp [hp]
  · sorry

exact this ((Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).eq_of_eq this)
    exact this.elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
      exact (h.out.ne_zero)
    omega

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp [hp]

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ZMod p) = 0 := by
      simpa using (ZMod.natCast_self p)
    have hp' : (1 : ZMod p) = 0 := by
      have : (p : ZMod p) = (1 : ZMod p) := by simpa [hp]
      simpa [this] using this
    have : (0 : ℕ) = 1 := by
      simpa using (ZMod.natCast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd p 1).1 hp'
    cases this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    exfalso
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [hp]
    have hp' : Nat.Prime 1 := by simpa [this] using h.out
    exact hp'.not_lt (by decide)
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ℕ) = 1 := by
      simpa [hp] using congrArg (fun n : ℕ => n % 4) hp
    exact (h.1.ne_one (by simpa [this]))

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : p = 1 := by
      nlinarith
    exfalso
    exact (h.out.ne_one this)
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp [hp]
  · sorry

exfalso
    have hp2 : 2 ≤ p := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p).two_le
    exact (ne_of_ge hp2) (by simpa [this])

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp at hp

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    exfalso
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [hp, Nat.mul_zero, Nat.zero_add] using hp
    exact (h.out.ne_one this)
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro _
    simp

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (4 : ℕ) * 0 + 1 = 1 := by simp
    have : p = 1 := by simpa [this] using hp
    have hp' : p ≠ 1 := by
      have := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p)
      exact this.ne_one
    exact (hp' this).elim
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    exfalso
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [hp] using rfl
    have hp' : Nat.Prime 1 := by
      simpa [this] using (h.out)
    exact hp'.ne_one rfl
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (4 : ℕ) * 0 + 1 = 1 := by simp
    have : p = 1 := by simpa [this] using hp
    have hp' : Nat.Prime 1 := by simpa [this] using (h.out)
    exact (hp'.ne_of_lt (by decide)).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ZMod p) = 0 := by
      simpa using (ZMod.natCast_self p)
    have hne : (p : ZMod p) ≠ 0 := by
      simpa using (show (1 : ZMod p) ≠ 0 from one_ne_zero)
    exact (hne (this.trans (by simp))).elim
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp [hp]
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : False := by
      have hp1 : p = 1 := by simpa using hp
      have hpne : p ≠ 1 := (Nat.Prime.ne_one (h := h.out))
      exact hpne hp1
    exact False.elim this
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : p = 1 := by
      linarith
    exact (Nat.Prime.ne_one (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p)) this
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    simp [hp]
  · sorry

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ℕ) = 1 := by
      have := congrArg (fun n => n % 4) hp
      simp at this
      exact Nat.eq_of_modEq_of_lt (Nat.ModEq.symm this) (by
        have : p < 4 := by
          have hp' : p = 1 := by
            have : p % 4 = 1 := by simpa [hp] using congrArg (fun n => n % 4) rfl
            exact Nat.eq_of_lt_of_modEq (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ (Nat.zero_lt_succ 3)) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self 3)) ) this
          simpa [hp'] )
    have hp' : (p : ℕ) = 1 := this
    have : False := by
      have : Nat.Prime 1 := h.out
      exact this.ne_one rfl
    exact (this.elim)
  · sorry
successful_attempts:
refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : False := by
      have hp' : p = 1 := by simpa [hp]
      have : (p : ℕ) ≠ 1 := (Nat.Prime.ne_one (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p))
      exact this hp'
    exact False.elim this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (4 : ℕ) * 0 + 1 = 1 := by simp
    have : p = 1 := by simpa [this] using hp
    have hp' : p ≠ 1 := (h.out.ne_one)
    exact (hp' this).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : False := by
      have hp1 : p = 1 := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.zero_add] using hp
      have hprime : Nat.Prime p := (h.out)
      exact hprime.ne_one hp1
    exact (this.elim)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [hp] using rfl
    have hp' : Nat.Prime 1 := by
      simpa [this] using (h.out)
    exact (Nat.not_prime_one hp').elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    exfalso
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.zero_add] using hp
    exact (h.out.ne_one this)

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : (p : ℤ) = 1 := by
      have : p = 1 := by
        nlinarith
      exact_mod_cast this
    cases (h.out.ne_one (by
      simpa using (show p = 1 from by
        nlinarith)))

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    exfalso
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hp
    have hpprime : Nat.Prime p := (Fact.out : Nat.Prime p)
    exact hpprime.ne_one this

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have : p = 1 := by
      simpa [mul_zero, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hp
    have hp' : (p : ZMod p) = 0 := by
      simpa [this] using (ZMod.natCast_self p)
    have hnp : ¬ p.Prime := by
      simpa [this] using (by decide : ¬ Nat.Prime 1)
    exact (hnp (by simpa using h.out)).elim

refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    intro hp
    have hp' : p = 1 := by
      nlinarith [hp]
    have : False := by
      have hpPos : 2 ≤ p := (Fact.out : p.Prime).two_le
      have : 2 ≤ 1 := by simpa [hp'] using hpPos
      exact Nat.not_succ_le_self 0 (by simpa using this)
    exact False.elim this
